top_signals.title: The Future of Forward Guidance Under Fed Chair Warsh
top_signals.summary: Torsten Slok, chief economist at Apollo, looks at potential changes to Federal Reserve communication under Chair Kevin Warsh. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin sell-off toward $60K may resume as Japan hikes interest rates
top_signals.summary: Japan’s highest rates since 1995 are putting global liquidity back in focus as traders anticipate 26%–38% BTC price declines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
